raw_text: a: address: calle aire 89, 30880, aguilas, murcia, spain hie resi nationality: spanish birthplace: córdoba, spain +34-678811612 yx urbamador@gmail.com urbano amador sanchez cover msc in aeronautical engineering since 2017. one year of experience in flight test analysis (teava -tl4) in airbus ds, seville. currently working in altran for the engine performance department (ipg) of airbus toulouse. highly commited with quality, continuous improvement and team worker. for any new project or issue i usually try to propose new ideas or methods in order to improve the performance of the team and always study in detail any technical issue that may appear. languages level: certificates: spanish: mother tongue. english (certified in 2016): cambridge english: english: negotiation level advanced (cae). c1 level. french: upper intermediate level. computer python applied to data analysis skills engine performance tools of airbus flight test data analysis tools of airbus ds proficiency in matlab/simulink and excel. machine learning: scikit-learn python library image processing tools: matlab and opencv. user level in catia, autocad, ansys, nastran/patran, stk, latex and microsoft project current consultant engineer at altran technologies in toulouse (france). working for engine performance (ipg1) work (since department of airbus. july 2018) e generation of engine performance databases e txwb, t7000 and ultrafan engines e validation of engine decks. e state-of-art study about model-based engine health monitoring e development of tools in python for automating simulations and dealing with great amounts of data. previous 07/2017- internship (gaia program) at airbus defence & space in seville. working within the department of work 07/2018 flight test analysis for the a400m program. experience e focused on power plant and ac performance areas. my main tasks were: give support to the flight tests of production aircrafts. o analysis of flight test campaigns. o give support to flight test preparation. validation of fti o experience with smart data analytics tools in ads flight test: event detection for fleet- wise problems and results analysis. e transversal activities to other atas such as analysis of trajectography, dgps and adaptation of ft analysis tools to alternative sources of data such as acms or dfdr. e collaboration in the noise certification campaign of the a330 neo (morón air base, april 2018). 09/2015- 07/2017 07/2015- 09/2015 researcher at the departament of electronic engineering of the university of seville. publications: [1] u. amador v. m. fico m. m. prats i. f. finazzi, l. parrilla, attitude estimation using airborne cameras, euro gnc 2017 - 4th ceas specialist conference on guidance, navigation : control (2017). projects: 1. prost (participated by airbus, tti and skylife): this project was related to the enhancement of weather radar functional tests in c295. 1 participated in the development of algorithms for simulating weather radar systems. 2. airports (participated by several universities and boeing r&t europe): integration of radio navigation aids in the navigation platform of an uav. the main innovation of this project was the use of sdr technology to reduce weight and cost. trainee in skylife engineering. participation in a project related to software defined radio (sdr). education 2009-2011 2011-2015 2015 2015-2017 2017 2017-2018 bachillerato. average mark of 9.7 out of 10. bachelors degree in aerospace engineering, speciality in aircrafts and space vehicles. university of seville. average mark of 8.76 out of 10. best grade possible (matricula de honor) obtained in 8 subjects such as electronic engineering, mechanics and vibrations, propulsion or avionics. bachelors thesis: study of suction on wing profiles. numerical study of the effects of applying suction on drag, stall behaviour and transition to turbulency on aerodynamic profiles. this project was developed using matlab. mark of 10 out of 10 with honours (matrícula de honor). masters degree in aeronautical engineering. university of seville. average mark of 8.86 out of 10. best grade possible (matricula de honor) obtained in 3 subjects such as advanced flight mechanics. masters thesis: attitude determination system based on image processing. this project continued the work developed in [1], which was based on the determination of pitch and roll angles through the detection of horizon on camera images. in the masters thesis it was added the yaw angle by detecting the position of sun within images. thus, a full attitude -pitch, roll and yaw- determination system was developed by using image processing. this included the development of a real-time simulink model and experimental tests. mark of 10 out of 10 with honours (matrícula de honor). master in decision making and innovation within the gaia program. this master was in english language and deals with a range of topics such as business, finances and communication skills. pegasus student conference. berlin 2017 this conference was organized by pegasus, the european association of aerospace universities. it was a competition where fifty students from all europe were selected to present technical papers. in my case, i went in representation ofthe university of seville with a project related to the detection of bird strike risk with the aid of cameras. this work included a simulation model developed in simulink and a study of maintenance costs due to bird strikes in commercial aircrafts. additional information participation in sinasa 2015, 2016 : 2017: the national seminar of avionics and air navigation systems. participation in a technological workshop related to alm (additive layer manufacturing). it was organized by the eads chairman of the university of seville. member of euroavia, the european association of aerospace students. driving license b. page 2
